name: Coding Agent
description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Builds features, reviews PRs, refactors codebases.

name: GitHub
description: GitHub operations via gh CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries.

name: GitHub Issues Auto-fix
description: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn sub-agents to implement fixes and open PRs, then monitor and address review comments.

name: Oracle
description: Prompt + file bundling CLI for querying LLMs with context. Sessions, engines, and file attachment patterns.

name: Canvas
description: Display HTML content on connected OpenClaw nodes (games, visualizations, dashboards, interactive demos).

name: Summarize
description: Summarize or extract text/transcripts from URLs, podcasts, YouTube videos, and local files.

name: PDF Editor
description: Edit PDFs with natural-language instructions using the nano-pdf CLI.

name: Video Frames
description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.

name: Image Generation
description: Batch-generate images via OpenAI Images API with random prompt sampler and gallery output.

name: Voice Call
description: Start and manage voice calls via the OpenClaw voice-call plugin (Twilio, Telnyx, Plivo).

name: Notion
description: Create and manage Notion pages, databases, and blocks via the Notion API.

name: Trello
description: Manage Trello boards, lists, and cards via the Trello REST API.

name: Google Workspace
description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.

name: Text-to-Speech (ElevenLabs)
description: ElevenLabs text-to-speech with mac-style say UX.

name: Text-to-Speech (Local)
description: Local offline text-to-speech via sherpa-onnx. No cloud dependency.

name: OpenProse
description: OpenProse VM skill pack for multi-agent workflows. Orchestrates sessions and file I/O via prose.md specification.

name: Lobster Workflows
description: Execute multi-step workflows with approval checkpoints. Repeatable automations with human-in-the-loop.

name: Peekaboo (macOS UI)
description: Capture and automate macOS UI with the Peekaboo CLI. Screen capture and UI interaction.

name: Camera Capture
description: Capture frames or clips from RTSP/ONVIF security cameras.

name: Apple Notes
description: Manage Apple Notes via the memo CLI on macOS (create, view, edit, delete, search notes).

name: Apple Reminders
description: Manage Apple Reminders via remindctl CLI (list, add, edit, complete, delete).

name: Bear Notes
description: Create, search, and manage Bear notes via grizzly CLI.

name: iMessage
description: iMessage/SMS CLI for listing chats, history, and sending messages via Messages.app.
